content: Better Auth admin plugin provides: user list/search/filter, create/update/delete, ban/unban with reason+expiry, role assignment (default: admin/user), and impersonation. Impersonation creates a session that mimics the target user — default 1hr TTL, configurable. The impersonating admin ID is stored in session metadata. Stop via authClient.admin.stopImpersonating(). Key security: restrict impersonation to specific roles, require reason, log every session. Active GitHub issues on custom user ID types and impersonation session duration. The plugin's audit trail is basic — production use requires supplementing with explicit audit log writes.
